tts_text: I TOLD YOU TO STAY OUT OF THIS! YOU HAD NO RIGHT TO GO BEHIND MY BACK! GET OUT OF MY SIGHT BEFORE I ABSOLUTELY LOSE IT!
Ugh, honestly? You're actually going to stand there and defend that? It's revolting... just looking at you makes my skin crawl.
Is... is someone there? Please... I can't... I heard a noise in the hall. Someone help me, please, I-I think the door is unlocking!
Oh my goodness, I am so incredibly thrilled for you! This is the most wonderful news! I knew you could do it—let's celebrate!
The shipment is scheduled to arrive at approximately four o'clock this afternoon. Please ensure the loading dock remains clear for the duration of the delivery.
I just... I don't really see the point anymore. Everything feels so heavy... and quiet. I thought things would be different by now. (sighs) I'm just so tired.
Wait-what?! You're here? But—how?! I thought you weren't coming back until next month! Oh my god, you completely shocked me!
